keyPoints: Two Roads Meet: Two types of networks in computer networking, Telecommunications and Local Area Networks (LANs), and Wide Area Networks (WANs).
Two Types of Networks: A network is broadly classified into two types - Telecommunications Network and Local Area Network (LAN) and Wide Area Network (WAN).
Three Network Models: The three models of computer networks are Open System Interconnection Model (OSI), Internet Model (TCP/IP), and Device Model.
